codeReview.summary: The core endpoint behavior changes are correct (canonical hosted URL, explicit-endpoint precedence, and trailing /spikes normalization), but the feature does not fully satisfy the repository purge requirement.

issues.description: A remaining source reference to `api.spikes.sh` exists in a test comment (`// DEPRECATED: This test was for the old api.spikes.sh endpoint`). The feature contract requires purging all `api.spikes.sh` references from the repo tree (outside excluded mission/ops artifacts).

summary: Reviewed endpoint-canonical for commit b94cac1. Functional behavior matches the feature goals, but one `api.spikes.sh` reference remains in `cli/src/config.rs`, so this review is marked fail.
